The current scores of zero are justified.\n\n5. **Malware Score Reflection**  \n   - The code does not exhibit malicious behavior.  \n   - The malware score of zero across all reports is appropriate.\n\n6. **Claims Based on Assumptions**  \n   - All reports base their conclusions on the code's structure, which is straightforward and standard.  \n   - No unwarranted assumptions about vulnerabilities or malicious intent are present.\n\n7. **Score Consistency**  \n   - The scores are consistent with the code's nature.  \n   - The high confidence levels (1) further support the benign assessment.\n\n---\n\n### Final Assessment\n\n- **Malware Score:** 0  \n- **Obfuscated Score:** 0  \n- **Risk Score:** 0\n\n**Overall Justification:**  \nThe code is a boilerplate, autogenerated contract factory for interacting with a known smart contract interface.
